features.name: web
features.description: Core polling feature allowing users to create, edit, vote on, and manage scheduling polls with options, participants, and results.

flows.name: view-and-vote-on-poll
flows.description: User opens a poll by URL, views options, and submits their votes. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(optional-space)/poll/[urlId]/page.tsx:1)

flows.name: edit-poll-details
flows.description: Poll admin edits the title, description, and other details of an existing poll. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(optional-space)/poll/[urlId]/edit-details/page.tsx:1)

flows.name: edit-poll-options
flows.description: Poll admin modifies the date and time options available for participants to vote on. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(optional-space)/poll/[urlId]/edit-options/page.tsx:1)

flows.name: browse-polls-dashboard
flows.description: Authenticated user views and filters their list of polls in the dashboard. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/(dashboard)/polls/page.tsx:8)

flows.name: quick-create-poll
flows.description: Guest or unauthenticated user rapidly creates a new poll using the quick-create widget.

flows.name: view-poll-invite
flows.description: User opens a shared poll invite link to view and participate in the poll.

flows.name: create-poll
flows.description: Host creates a new scheduling poll and receives an email with admin and participant links.

flows.name: create-poll-notify-host
flows.description: Host receives an email confirmation when a new meeting poll is created with links to manage and share it.

flows.name: respond-to-poll
flows.description: Participant receives a confirmation email after submitting their poll response, and the host is notified of the new response.

flows.name: generate-poll-og-image
flows.description: Server generates and returns an Open Graph social preview image for a poll page.

flows.name: share-poll-invite-link
flows.description: User copies and shares the invite link for a poll with participants.

flows.name: create-poll
flows.description: Host creates a new scheduling poll and receives an email with admin and participant links.

flows.name: submit-poll-response
flows.description: Participant submits a response to a poll and receives a confirmation email; the host is also notified of the new response.

flows.name: finalize-poll-event
flows.description: Host finalizes a date for a poll, triggering notification emails to both the host and all participants; participants are notified if the event is later canceled.

flows.name: notify-poll-comment
flows.description: A comment is posted on a poll and the host receives a new-comment notification email.

flows.name: poll-results-flow
flows.description: Calculate and retrieve poll results and voting statistics.

flows.name: manage-polls-flow
flows.description: Create, delete, and retrieve polls with participant data.

flows.name: view-scheduled-events-flow
flows.description: Query upcoming, past, unconfirmed, and chronological event listings.

flows.name: api-schema-definitions-flow
flows.description: Define request/response schemas for private API poll operations.

flows.name: poll-participant-token-flow
flows.description: Generate and validate tokens for poll participant access and editing.

flows.name: legacy-poll-access-flow
flows.description: Support legacy URL-based access to polls for participants and admins.

flows.name: configure-instance-settings
flows.description: Admin configures instance-wide authentication and security settings from the control panel.

flows.name: customize-instance-branding
flows.description: Admin configures custom branding including logo, colors, and app name for the instance.

flows.name: administer-instance
flows.description: Admin accesses the control panel to manage users, license, branding, and instance settings.

flows.name: registration-config-flow
flows.description: Check if user registration is enabled on the instance.

flows.name: branding-config-flow
flows.description: Retrieve and apply instance branding configuration including colors and styling.

flows.name: instance-settings-update-flow
flows.description: Update instance-wide configuration settings from admin control panel.

flows.name: view-dashboard
flows.description: Authenticated user lands on the home dashboard showing their activity and stats. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/(dashboard)/page.tsx:7)

flows.name: view-dashboard-home
flows.description: User lands on the dashboard home page to see stats and navigate to key actions. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/(dashboard)/dashboard-home.tsx:24)

flows.name: navigate-via-command-menu
flows.description: User opens the global command menu via keyboard shortcut to quickly navigate to any page.

flows.name: ssr-helper-flow
flows.description: Create server-side rendering helpers for different authentication contexts (public, private, admin).

flows.name: connect-calendar-provider
flows.description: User connects a calendar provider (e.g. Google Calendar) to their account from the calendar settings page. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/calendars/page.tsx:1)

flows.name: manage-calendar-connections
flows.description: User views, syncs, disconnects, or sets a default calendar from the calendar settings page. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/calendars/components/calendar-connection-list.tsx:1)

flows.name: view-calendar-dashboard
flows.description: User views their upcoming scheduled events in a calendar layout on the main calendar dashboard page. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/(dashboard)/calendar/page.tsx:1)

flows.name: browse-events-list
flows.description: User browses, filters, and searches scheduled events in the events dashboard with infinite scroll. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/(dashboard)/events/page.tsx:1)

flows.name: export-event-to-external-calendar
flows.description: User exports a scheduled event to Google Calendar, Outlook, Office 365, Yahoo, or downloads an ICS file.

flows.name: cancel-scheduled-event
flows.description: User cancels a scheduled event, triggering notifications to all invitees via email.

flows.name: finalize-event-date
flows.description: Host and participants receive emails notifying them that a final event date has been booked, including a calendar invite.

flows.name: cancel-event
flows.description: Participants receive an email notifying them that a scheduled event has been canceled by the host.

flows.name: ics-event-creation-flow
flows.description: Generate ICS calendar event files for export.

flows.name: calendar-selection-flow
flows.description: Set the user's default calendar selection.

flows.name: calendar-integration-flow
flows.description: Handle calendar provider connections and OAuth callbacks.

flows.name: create-space
flows.description: User creates a new space during initial setup by providing a space name.

flows.name: switch-active-space
flows.description: User switches between spaces they belong to from the space dropdown in the sidebar.

flows.name: delete-space
flows.description: Space owner permanently deletes a space by confirming its name in a dialog. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/general/components/delete-space-button.tsx:28)

flows.name: leave-space
flows.description: User leaves a space they are a member of by confirming the space name in a dialog. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/general/components/leave-space-button.tsx:39)

flows.name: claim-admin-role
flows.description: Initial admin user grants themselves the admin role to gain access to the control panel.

flows.name: accept-space-invite
flows.description: Invited user views and accepts a space membership invitation.

flows.name: configure-space-general-settings
flows.description: User manages space name, description, and general preferences from the space settings page. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/general/page.tsx:5)

flows.name: invite-user-to-space
flows.description: Invited user receives an email to accept an invitation to join a shared space with an assigned role.

flows.name: invite-to-space
flows.description: User invites another person to a space and the invitee receives a space-invite email.

flows.name: manage-spaces-flow
flows.description: Create spaces, manage membership, retrieve space data and seat allocation.

flows.name: update-profile-preferences
flows.description: Authenticated user changes their display name, locale, timezone, time format, or week start preference.

flows.name: change-email-address
flows.description: User requests an email change and confirms it by clicking the verification link sent to the new address.

flows.name: manage-notification-preferences
flows.description: User views and updates their notification preferences from the settings notifications page. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/notifications/page.tsx:0)

flows.name: browse-and-delete-users
flows.description: Admin browses, searches, filters, and deletes users from the control panel users page.

flows.name: edit-user-profile
flows.description: User updates their profile information and can delete their account. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/profile/page.tsx:9)

flows.name: manage-users-flow
flows.description: Create users, manage active space selection, and query user account state.

flows.name: view-api-keys
flows.description: User navigates to the API Keys settings page to see all existing API keys for their space. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/api-keys/page.tsx:22)

flows.name: create-api-key
flows.description: User creates a new named API key for programmatic access to their space.

flows.name: revoke-api-key
flows.description: User revokes an existing API key to prevent further programmatic access.

flows.name: api-key-generation-flow
flows.description: Generate new API keys for developer access.

flows.name: configure-datetime-preferences
flows.description: User updates their time zone, time format, and week start day from the settings preferences page. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/preferences/page.tsx:14)

flows.name: accept-detected-timezone-change
flows.description: User is prompted to update their saved time zone when the browser's detected time zone differs from their stored preference.

flows.name: timezone-detection-flow
flows.description: Detect and retrieve the user's browser timezone.

flows.name: date-time-utilities-flow
flows.description: Utilities for calculating duration and formatting date properties.

flows.name: timezone-lookup-flow
flows.description: Utilities for timezone offset calculation and city lookup.

flows.name: upload-and-crop-profile-image
flows.description: User selects an image file, crops it in a dialog, and uploads it to S3 storage via a presigned URL.

flows.name: image-preview-flow
flows.description: Generate preview URLs for uploaded images.

flows.name: image-upload-flow
flows.description: Manage image storage operations including S3 client initialization and image deletion.

flows.name: manage-storage-flow
flows.description: Upload and retrieve files from instance storage.

flows.name: og-image-generation-flow
flows.description: Generate Open Graph preview images for landing page and polls.

flows.name: manage-account-security
flows.description: User sets up or changes their password and manages security settings. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/security/page.tsx:28)

bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

features.name: documentation
features.description: Documentation, tutorials, examples, and marketing pages.

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix i18n link issue (#1914)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix issue where pages are not pre-rendered correctly (#1913)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix missing opengraph image (#1828)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

features.name: auth
features.description: Authentication and account access — sign-in, sign-up, password recovery, email verification, session management.

flows.name: login
flows.description: User signs in via email/OTP, SSO, or OIDC provider. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(auth)/login/page.tsx:36)

flows.name: register-account
flows.description: New user creates an account with name and email when registration is enabled. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(auth)/register/page.tsx:18)

flows.name: verify-login-otp
flows.description: User completes email-based login by entering a one-time passcode sent to their inbox. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(auth)/login/verify/page.tsx:1)

flows.name: authenticate-api-request
flows.description: External client authenticates using a bearer API key to call the private REST API endpoints.

flows.name: verify-email-registration
flows.description: User receives a 6-digit verification code email to confirm their new account email address.

flows.name: request-password-reset
flows.description: User submits their email address to receive a password reset link. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(auth)/forgot-password/page.tsx:18)

flows.name: reset-password
flows.description: User requests a password reset and receives a reset-password email.

flows.name: change-password
flows.description: Authenticated user updates their existing password from the security settings page. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/security/page.tsx:1)

flows.name: setup-password
flows.description: OAuth-authenticated user sets up a password for the first time via a dashboard alert prompt. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/(dashboard)/password-setup-alert.tsx:13)

flows.name: register-and-verify-email
flows.description: User registers an account and receives a 6-digit email verification code.

flows.name: change-email-address
flows.description: User requests an email address change and receives a confirmation email.

flows.name: change-email-address
flows.description: User requests an email address change and receives a confirmation email.

flows.name: user-context-flow
flows.description: Retrieve current authenticated user and their active space context.

flows.name: session-retrieval-flow
flows.description: Fetch the current user session from authentication context.

flows.name: session-check-flow
flows.description: Utility to check if a user is currently authenticated and retrieve their ID.

flows.name: oauth-integration-flow
flows.description: Handle OAuth provider authentication and callback redirects.

flows.name: session-token-flow
flows.description: Generate and manage session tokens for user authentication.

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix client crash when NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL is not set at build time (#2303)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix broken compatibility with previous oidc redirect uri (#2012)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix possible infinite loop (#1984)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix occasional crash when accessing settings (#1982)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix checkout not redirecting guest to login (#1851)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: ♻️ App error and ability context (#1844)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

features.name: billing
features.description: Subscription and payment management including plan selection, seat management, Stripe integration, pricing logic, and webhook-driven lifecycle events. (merged: apps/web/billing, packages/billing)

flows.name: view-billing-settings
flows.description: User views their current billing plan, subscription status, and seat usage in the billing settings page. (entry: apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(space)/settings/billing/page.tsx:0)

flows.name: upgrade-subscription-checkout
flows.description: User initiates a Stripe checkout session to upgrade their space to a paid subscription plan.

flows.name: manage-payment-methods
flows.description: User opens the Stripe billing portal to manage their saved payment methods.

flows.name: process-stripe-webhook
flows.description: Stripe sends webhook events (checkout completed/expired, subscription created/updated/deleted, customer and payment method changes) which are verified and dispatched to update internal billing state.

flows.name: activate-license-key
flows.description: Self-hosted user submits a license key to activate or refresh their instance license.

flows.name: issue-license-key
flows.description: Internal API creates or validates a license key for a self-hosted customer via the licensing REST API.

flows.name: recover-abandoned-checkout
flows.description: User who abandoned a Rallly Pro checkout receives a follow-up email with a discount coupon to complete the upgrade.

flows.name: pricing-retrieval-flow
flows.description: Fetch and calculate pricing information for billing plans.

flows.name: subscription-confirmation-flow
flows.description: Generate Stripe subscription update confirmation messages.

flows.name: stripe-billing-flow
flows.description: Manage Stripe subscription portal, license purchases, and webhook event processing.

flows.name: license-management-flow
flows.description: Retrieve and validate instance license and feature entitlements.

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix race condition by handling customer creation in checkout (#1894)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix checkout not redirecting guest to login (#1851)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛  Fix licensing checkout and webhook (#1731)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

features.name: database
features.description: Prisma-based database client and schema configuration for the monorepo, providing a shared data access layer used by all backend services.

flows.name: seed-database-flow
flows.description: Developer seeds the database with initial or test data using Prisma seed scripts.

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix users not able to login with microsoft account created with legacy providers (#2077)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛  Fix licensing checkout and webhook (#1731)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

flows.name: posthog-bootstrap-flow
flows.description: Generate PostHog analytics bootstrap cookie for client-side initialization.

features.name: packages
features.description: Files under packages/ extracted from billing (auto-split for granularity)

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix race condition by handling customer creation in checkout (#1894)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix checkout not redirecting guest to login (#1851)

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛  Fix licensing checkout and webhook (#1731)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

bug_fix_prs.title: 🩹 Fix incorrect auth client base url (#2004)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

flows.name: locale-detection-flow
flows.description: Detect and resolve user's preferred locale from request headers and configuration.

flows.name: landing-i18n-flow
flows.description: Internationalization setup and translation retrieval for the landing site.

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix locale fallback mechanism (#1734)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

flows.name: logging-initialization-flow
flows.description: Initialize and configure structured logging with wide event support.

bug_fix_prs.title: 🧑‍💻 Implement better error logs for trpc route (#2151)
bug_fix_prs.author: Luke Vella

flows.name: test-data-setup-flow
flows.description: Test utilities for creating users, spaces, and polls in the database for integration testing.

flows.name: email-verification-flow
flows.description: Extract verification codes and password reset links from test email messages.

flows.name: mailpit-integration-flow
flows.description: Query and manage test email messages via Mailpit API.
